productLines.description: Engineering tools, validation toolchains, requirement tools, CI pipelines and traceability tooling.

rules.recommendationReason: Engineering tools shall provide controllable verification workflows and reviewable evidence.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only if the tool is not used for verification or evidence generation.

rules.recommendationReason: Tools usually exchange data with requirement tools, test tools, CI systems and repositories.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only for isolated standalone tools without data exchange.

rules.recommendationReason: Tool users, scripts and exported evidence shall be traceable and authenticated where required.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only for offline non controlled prototypes.

productLines.description: Camera radar fusion, AEB, LKA, HMI warning, diagnostic handling, degradation and safe state control.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS project shall confirm that perception, fusion, warning, degraded operation and diagnostic functions required by the project scope are covered.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only if the function is fully outside project boundary or handled by another ECU or platform team.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS decisions depend on correct perception, fusion and warning behavior.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only when the assessed component does not provide function output affecting vehicle or driver decisions.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS functions have timing constraints for perception update, warning request and degraded state transition.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only for offline tools or non runtime analysis components.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS availability state shall be managed based on sensor health, vehicle state and system conditions.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only when the assessed scope is not responsible for runtime service availability.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS shall tolerate sensor dropout, stale input, inconsistent data and partial degradation where defined by the safety concept.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only if fault handling is fully outside the assessed system boundary.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS configuration, calibration, object data and diagnostic state shall be protected against unauthorized modification.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only if the assessed item has no data input, configuration, communication or update interface.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS functions may influence warning, braking or steering related decisions, therefore risk identification is required.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only if the assessed scope has no safety relevant behavior or decision influence.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS shall enter or maintain safe state when confirmed hazardous failures occur.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only if fail safe behavior is completely handled by another system and outside project responsibility.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS shall warn the driver or other vehicle systems when hazardous situations or limitations are detected.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only when the assessed component does not provide warning, availability or limitation status.

rules.recommendationReason: ADAS shall prevent inappropriate activation or misuse under unsupported operating conditions.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only if no user interaction or activation behavior is in project scope.

rules.recommendationReason: Replaceability is not a primary project level quality concern for most ADAS function assessment scopes.
rules.notApplicableReason: The project does not include runtime replacement of equivalent software products or third party replacement scenarios.

rules.recommendationReason: Reusability may be relevant if the ADAS platform is shared across vehicle programs.
rules.notApplicableReason: If the project is a one off assessment without platform reuse objective, this item may be treated as low priority or covered by platform.

productLines.description: Smart city mobility services, infrastructure integration, user interaction, availability and safe integration.

rules.recommendationReason: City mobility services exchange data with infrastructure, vehicles, user applications and operation centers.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only when the service is isolated and has no external dependency.

rules.recommendationReason: Mobility services shall consider different user groups and accessibility needs.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only for non user facing backend components.

rules.recommendationReason: Mobility service and infrastructure service integration may create safety relevant conflict scenarios.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only if the service has no safety relevant integration with mobility operations.

productLines.description: Cloud platforms, data driven services, AI inference service, model deployment and operational monitoring.

rules.recommendationReason: Cloud and AI services shall handle defined workload, traffic volume and model serving capacity.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only when workload capacity is outside the service responsibility.

rules.recommendationReason: Tenant data, model input, model output and logs shall be protected against unauthorized access.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only for fully synthetic or non sensitive data prototypes.

rules.recommendationReason: Cloud services and AI inference services usually require horizontal or workload based scaling.
rules.notApplicableReason: Not applicable only for fixed offline evaluation tools.
